firstNightReminder: You start knowing 3 characters: exactly 1 of them has an evil neighbor.
name: Rosetender
ability: You start knowing 3 characters: exactly 1 of them has an evil neighbor.

firstNightReminder: You start knowing up to 5 players.
name: Heliolater
ability: You start knowing some players. Each may publicly guess 1 other player is the Demon & which team wins if correct.

firstNightReminder: All Townsfolk learn who the Emporer is.
name: Emperor
ability: All Townsfolk start knowing you. If the Demon publicly guesses you (once), your team loses, even if dead.

firstNightReminder: Choose a player and call them fowl
otherNightReminder: Choose a player and call them fowl
name: Night Owl
ability: Each night, choose a player: learn whether they neighbor an evil player or not. The Early Bird gets false info.

name: Early Bird
ability: Each day, visit the Storyteller & choose a player: learn a fact about them. The Night Owl gets false info.

firstNightReminder: Reconsider your Guerilla gesture, because that one might be a little innapropraite.
otherNightReminder: Point to a character on the sheet with the 'In-Group' reminder on the Grimoire. Then remove the reminder.
name: Guerrilla [X]
ability: Each night*, learn a character who did your gesture (you know it). You're drunk if a Minion guesses you (once).

name: Prince
ability: Each night*, learn if the player you nominated today is the Demon. If a player you've nominated is executed, lose this ability.

name: Diviner
ability: Once per game, during the day, privately make a wish: learn what you must be "mad" about and for how long to make it come true.
flavor: Bring me my Bow of burning gold: // Bring me my Arrows of desire: // Bring me my Spear: O clouds unfold: // Bring me my Chariot of fire!

firstNightReminder: When giving players bluffs, show them the "These characters are not in play" info card, and then in-play characters intead of out of play ones. Do not show them the Rogue token. You may show them the same token multiple times if nessessary.
name: Rogue
ability: Bluffs are in-play characters (not Rogue).
flavor: Forgive me, Alice, but you weren't using this name. Or this face. Or this persona. Or-

firstNightReminder: Minions & Demons don't learn each other. Instead, they learn a hint or secret phrase to help find their team.
name: Anchoress
ability: Minions & Demons don't learn each other. Instead, they learn a hint or secret phrase to help find their team.

firstNightReminder: After Demon info, 1 Minion is "the Demon" instead of them.
name: Patron
ability: After Demon info, 1 Minion is "the Demon" instead of them. You & the original Demon keep your abilities when dead.

otherNightReminder: If tonight is the final night, wake the Ritualist, they point at a player: if the Demon, they swap alignments.
name: Ritualist
ability: On the final night, choose a player who didn't die tonight: a chosen Demon swaps alignments.

name: Barnstormer
ability: If every living evil player votes for your execution & you die, good wins. If you're mad you're the Barnstormer, you're drunk.

firstNightReminder: Ask the Pandora if they wanna box. They can do this during the day.
otherNightReminder: Ask the Pandora if they wanna box. They can do this during the day.
name: Pandora
ability: Once per game, privately choose that something bad happens: learn what. If you added a Minion, it's good instead. [+0 or +1 Minion]

name: Phasmosoph
ability: If you die, something useful your team has done becomes dangerous or obsolete & tomorrow, you may privately learn a hint how.

name: Kabuki [X]
ability: If you're mad you're a Townsfolk, you might become one. [+0 or +1 Outsider, most Outsiders are Kabuki]

name: Margrave
ability: If only Outsiders & Demons live, Demons turn good & living Outsiders turn evil. (even if dead)

name: Dayrazer
ability: Once per game, at dawn, publicly name an event - it might happen at a point from now on. If you are executed, it will.

firstNightReminder: Wake each Minion player individually. Show the 'These characters are out of play' card and a good character token.
name: Abumbrella
ability: You get 3 bluffs. The Demon thinks they’re a good character & you wake for them.

name: Heresiarch
ability: Townsfolk who don't wake or visit the Storyteller think they're different good characters.

name: Buggane
ability: If an alive Outsider is nominated & you claim to be the Buggane, your team wins if they're not executed. [+1 Outsider]

firstNightReminder: Wake the Inysyns and show them a number: note that number. On the night before that day, mark the Inysnys with "Judgement Day": if they would lose today, they win instead.
otherNightReminder: The Insyns points to a player: that player dies.
name: Inysyns
ability: You start knowing a day: on that day, if 3 or more live & good wins, they lose instead. Each night*, choose a player: they die.
flavor: There is a weakness in the air today. All an “apocalypse” is, truly, is a revelation. Why not simply accept the revelation of the new saint of all realities?

otherNightReminder: Choose a player, that player dies.
name: Legion
ability: Each night*, a player might die. Executions fail if only evil voted. You register as a Minion too. [Most players are Legion]

firstNightReminder: Give the Eodinai a clue about their setup change. You can do this at any time.
name: Eodinai
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. You know your setup change, or a clue to it. [Anything, even if it breaks the rules]
attribution: BakedIce, art by TheDarkArtist, Correct Icon
flavor: Once the roots have perforated your feeble eardrums, once the leaves have replaced your tongue.... You will finally hear and say things of importance.

otherNightReminder: Wake the Diabolist. They point to a player. Mark that player with the "Dead" reminder token. The Diabolist then points to a player, then a non-Demon character. That player becomes this character, if not already in play.
name: Novomane
ability: Each night*, choose a player: they die. Good only wins if they resign. You keep this ability if dead & might register falsely.
flavor: Those who gaze into the void often never return. I however, have gleaned the blackened secrets hidden deep within the vast expanse of the nothing. And no one else shall ever gaze upon them again.

name: Dealer
ability: Each night, you know what happens to whoever picks up the phone when it rings tomorrow: they learn what happens too.

name: Wise Guy
ability: Each day, ask the Storyteller for anything. If they agree, it occurs. Tonight, a different player learns what you asked for.
flavor: Heh! I'm the wise guy! Here's an offer you cannot refuse, meeting my little friend! Tommy Gunn! Pew! Pew! Blam! You're dead!!,, No! I killed you! You're dead! I said "unreversable and undodgeable"! Nuh uh you just didn't hear it! I'll tell Miss you're cheating! Meanie!

name: Rail Devil
ability: Each night, move 1 or 3 steps clockwise. Your neighbors always have a vote token. [You choose where to sit]
